# SEOHub

> Free tool that scans any public website and reports what you have and what's missing for SEO, performance, security, and accessibility. Browser-first weekly audit with pay-per-scan unlock — not a backlink suite.

## Docs

- [Homepage](/): Run a website audit
- [Competitor audit](/competitors): Compare up to 10 external websites side by side
- [Technical SEO Checklist](/checklist/technical-seo): Free printable technical SEO checklist (Save as PDF)
- [Guides](/guides): Short fix guides for common SEO issues
- [Blog](/blog): Practical SEO articles
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle data
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms of use
- [About](/about): About SEOHub

## Comparisons

Honest framing: SEOHub is a browser-first weekly site audit + pay-per-scan. It does not claim to beat Ahrefs or Semrush on backlinks.

- [Comparisons index](/compare): All SEOHub vs pages
- [SEOHub vs Ahrefs](/compare/seohub-vs-ahrefs): Weekly audit vs backlink research suite
- [SEOHub vs Semrush](/compare/seohub-vs-semrush): Focused crawl checklist vs all-in-one marketing suite
- [SEOHub vs Ubersuggest](/compare/seohub-vs-ubersuggest): Technical audit vs lighter keyword research
- [SEOHub vs free SEO checkers](/compare/seohub-vs-free-seo-checkers): Homepage grades vs crawl + toolkit
- [Best free SEO tools](/compare/best-free-seo-tools): Where SEOHub fits among free options

- [Tools](/tools): Full free toolkit
- [Keyword research](/tools/keywords)
- [Security headers](/tools/headers)
- [Redirect chain](/tools/redirects)
- [JSON-LD schema](/tools/schema)
- [Broken links](/tools/broken-links)
- [robots.txt & sitemap](/tools/robots)
